description_long: This object is a realistic crab with a broad, oval-shaped carapace that is dark brown to olive in color, featuring a slightly rough, matte texture. It has eight slender walking legs and two prominent claws (chelae), with the claws being noticeably larger and lighter in color, transitioning from brown at the base to pale white at the tips. The legs are jointed and splayed outward, giving the crab a wide stance. The eyes are small and positioned on short stalks at the front of the carapace, while the mouthparts and antennae are less visible. The underside of the crab is lighter in color, and the overall form is compact and robust, typical of many urban-dwelling or market crabs. The crab is displayed on a white textured surface with a small, colorful reference cube nearby for scale.
description: A lifelike crab with a dark, oval carapace, large pale claws, and eight splayed legs, shown on a white textured surface with a reference cube.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad carapace, both large claws, and the crab's face with eyes on short stalks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length and articulation of the legs and the size difference between the claws.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the lighter underside of the legs and the back edge of the carapace.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the curvature of the carapace and the pale coloration of the claws.
